steps.title: Identify the key constraint
steps.content: The notes describe chain-melt guest atoms as “confined to one-dimensional movement by the host.” Since a liquid requires atoms to move freely in three dimensions, this confinement is the decisive clue explaining why the state is not fully liquid.

steps.title: Match the explanation to the goal
steps.content: Choice B answers the goal by identifying the mechanism: the solid lattice prevents the free three-dimensional movement that defines liquidity. The other choices describe structure, contradict the findings, or cite an incomplete reason. This matches choice B — B is correct.
